svg.text: Connects a task to the project it belongs to. Every task must belong to exactly one project; a project may contain many tasks.
A user can be assigned to many tasks. When assignee_id is NULL the task is unassigned.
Links a project back to its creator. The creator has full administrative rights over the project. This link is defined here, between the tables it references.

g.text: Unique task record inside a project. Tasks belong to exactly one project and have one optional assignee.
Foreign key → users.id; NULL means the task is unassigned
Short human-readable summary shown in board views
Full description; supports Markdown. May be NULL when the task was created from a template without a body.
Workflow state: pending – not yet started in-progress – actively being worked on done – completed and accepted blocked – waiting on an external dependency cancelled – will not be completed
A project is owned by one creator and can contain many tasks.
The user who originally created this project
Human-readable project name (shown in the dashboard)
URL-safe slug used in deep-link permalinks
A user can act as a project creator and / or a task assignee.
Credentials are stored as bcrypt hashes; plain-text passwords
Must be unique across the entire platform
bcrypt hash; cost factor configured per environment
